content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://clinicaltrials.gov/study/NCT06307275", "source_title": "ClinicalTrials.gov NCT06307275 IF trial", "source_type": "other", "source_quality": 0.15, "overall_relevance": 0.15, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [], "evidence_summary": "INSUFFICIENT_CONTENT: Generic ClinicalTrials.gov definitions, no study-specific data."}, {"source_url": "https://www.lipid.org/lipid-spin/fall-2023/specialty-corner-medical-nutrition-therapy-pre-", "source_title": "Specialty Corner: Medical Nutrition Therapy for Pre-Diabetes", "source_type": "journal_article", "source_quality": 0.55, "overall_relevance": 0.45, "year": 2023, "authors": [], "venue": "Lipid Spin", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Medical nutrition therapy delivered by trained registered dietitian nutritionists is clinically beneficial and cost-effective for cardiometabolic disease.", "direct_quote": "Research has shown that this therapy is clinically beneficial and cost effective.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.5, "confidence": 0.9, "perspective": "Economic", "entities": ["MNT", "RDN"]}, {"statement": "General dietary recommendations include limiting highly processed foods, fatty meats, and added sugars; Mediterranean and DASH diets are the two most researched accepted healthy patterns.", "direct_quote": "General recommendations for a healthy diet include limiting highly processed foods, limiting fatty meats, and decreasing added sugars", "fact_category": "named_entity", "relevance_score": 0.45, "confidence": 0.9, "perspective": "Public_Health", "entities": ["Mediterranean diet", "DASH"]}], "evidence_summary": "MNT guidance for cardiometabolic disease; adjacent source for clinical-nutrition context."}]}
